title: HG Natural Stone Cleaner Shine Restorer, Product 37, Highly Concentrated Formula for Marble and Calciferous Natural Stone, Mop or Polish for Restoring Shine – 1L (221100106)
features: HG Natural Stone Cleaner: This natural stone cleaning solution is ideal for cleaning marble, slate, quartz, sandstone and all other types of calciferous natural stone flooring
Shine restorer: As well as removing dirt, muck and marks the effective cleaner also restores the natural shine to your stone
Floor protection: The HG Natural Stone Cleaner leaves minuscule acrylic balls behind on the surface, protecting the marble / natural stone surface against scratching
Usage: One litre of HG Natural Stone Cleaner Shine Restorer is sufficient for approximately 20 washes
How to use: Dissolve 50ml in 5L of lukewarm water, clean the floor with a wrung-out mop or floor cloth, regularly ringing in the tile cleaning solution, then leave to dry
description: Product Description HG natural stone cleaner shine restorer is a freshly-scented, concentrated cleaner for marble flooring and other calciferous natural stone - 1 litre is sufficient for approximately 20 washes. This mopping cleaner was developed for regular cleaning of natural stone floors. This mopping cleaner is for regular and convenient cleaning that also restores shine. HG Natural Stone Cleaner Shine Restorer leaves minuscule acrylic balls behind on the surface. This protects the marble surface and any applications of HG Marble and Natural Stone Shine Finish against scratching. The surface gets a new gloss at the same time. Includes: 1x HG natural stone cleaner shine restorer (1L Bottle) How to use HG natural stone cleaner shine restorer (Product 37, 221100106): 1. Dissolve 50 ml (½ cup) in half a bucket (5 L) of lukewarm water. 2. Clean the floor with a wrung-out mop or floor cloth, regularly rinsing it in the tile cleaning solution. 3. Do not rinse or mop the floor again - leave it to dry. HG Natural Stone Cleaner Shine Restorer is suitable on all polished, un-sealed and surfaces sealed with HG Marble Impregnator and/or HG Marble and Natural Stone Shine Finish as well as crystallized surfaces. Box Contains 1 x 1L
